description: Perform a data lifecycle management task by archiving and purging old flight records. Identify the 'FlightPlan' model in the Aerobridge system (likely in the 'flight_passport' or 'gcs_operations' app) and archive all records with a start time strictly before January 1, 2024, by serializing them to /home/ga/archive_pre2024.json. Delete these specific historical records from the database while ensuring all flight plans starting on or after January 1, 2024, remain intact.
